# foobar2000 SDK — vendored copy

- **Release**: 2025-03-07 (current release at vendoring time)
- **Source**: https://www.foobar2000.org/downloads/SDK-2025-03-07.7z
- **Vendored**: 2026-07-12 (feature 013-foobar-component-port, task T002)
- **License**: see `sdk-license.txt` (zlib-style; redistribution of SDK sources permitted)

Contents kept verbatim from the archive: `pfc/`, `foobar2000/` (SDK,
component_client, helpers, shared, samples), `libPPUI/`, license and readme.
Built via our own CMake (`component/CMakeLists.txt`) — the shipped
`.vcxproj`/Xcode projects are unused.
